name: lawmem-ai/lawmem-mcp
title: LawMem — Legal Memory for AI Agents
description: LawMem gives legal AI agents persistent, searchable memory via MCP. Store case notes, client context, research findings, and matter history — recalled semantically when relevant. Namespace-isolated, audit-logged, GDPR-compliant.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a memory with text, namespace, and optional metadata
